data.code_body:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
Excel 解析器 - 将 Excel 文件的每个 Sheet 解析成一张表
"""
import pandas as pd
import os

# Excel 文件路径
excel_path = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(__file__)), "..", "..", "..", "资源", "files", "科研项目_模拟人员混杂数据.xlsx_72326a69", "原文件.xlsx")
excel_path = os.path.abspath(excel_path)

# 读取所有 Sheet
excel_file = pd.ExcelFile(excel_path)
sheet_names = excel_file.sheet_names

# 存储每个 Sheet 对应的表
tables = {}
for sheet_name in sheet_names:
    df = pd.read_excel(excel_file, sheet_name=sheet_name)
    table_name = f"table_{sheet_name}"
    tables[table_name] = df

# 输出：返回所有表的数据
result_df = pd.DataFrame({
    "sheet_name": sheet_names,
    "table_name": [f"table_{s}" for s in sheet_names],
    "row_count": [len(pd.read_excel(excel_file, sheet_name=s)) for s in sheet_names]
})
